microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized deployment system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, authoring product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model field teams could own.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — scoped, built, and **deployed to production** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable validation playbook across enterprise customer environments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring real-time unblocking of deployment blockers across engineering and ops teams.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflow automation pipelines using prompt-engineered skills, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-assisted development adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading technical workshops and hands-on working sessions, encoding repeatable code-generation workflows into reusable patterns that saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML skill authoring** by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure engineering teams, surfacing deployment friction and translating field observations into actionable feedback for the product team.

Improved semantic data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling non-technical stakeholders to query knowledge bases in plain English.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — translating vague stakeholder requirements into a scoped, shippable delivery roadmap.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths and codify deployment patterns into reusable playbooks field teams could replicate independently.

Engineered a **Power BI analytics dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and make data-driven decisions without requiring engineering support.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing delivery to protect timelines under compressed customer-facing deadlines.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and enabling self-sufficient operations teams to maintain and extend the system post-handoff.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process — translating ambiguous backlog requirements into scoped, actionable engineering specs.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, translating business requirements into a repeatable operational system that non-technical staff could own.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to surface the right offering to the right customer segment at point of intent.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering variance insights in a format Finance stakeholders could act on directly without engineering translation.
